description: Wave-74 trivia surfaced new prose for Piccolo Jr. cards (TB2-040), Master Roshi (TB2-057), and Jackie Chun (TB2-058) — none of which is Saiyan-lineage trivia. The Saiyan-line refusal from wave 73 holds: Gowasu-Zamasu stewardship-betrayed beat is canonical for Universe-10 Supreme-Kai-lineage NOT Saiyan-lineage; Goku-mentors-Uub canonical-End-of-Z beat would carry stewardship but no wave-74 prose surfaced it; Pan-resists-Baby-possession canonical-GT-Saga beat would carry rebellion but no wave-74 prose surfaced it; Bardock-Goku-Gohan-Pan four-generation lineage would need each node's body to carry canonical-citations for the missing verbs and the wave-74 trivia pass did not extend any of the four. Wave-74 trivia DID surface stewardship-citations for Piccolo Jr. (TB2-027 + BT1-045 + TB2-040 all citing Gohan-mentor / Goten-Trunks-Fusion-instructor / villain-to-stewardship-pipeline registers); that finding is transferred to the Mr. Nodeley commission for piccolo-jr.md (see wave74-mr-nodeley sidecar). The Saiyan-line + Bardock-line + Goku-line trajectories remain at their existing single-or-dual hub attributions until canonical-citation prose surfaces in their node bodies. The discipline holds.
citations: [[_triple-thesis]] — refusal-with-receipts as first-class output; hubs get stripped if attribution can't survive what's-the-canonical-citation question]
[memory: bbl-museum-curation-framing — refusal-with-receipts is curator behavior not bug]
[memory: bbl-edgelord-node-rigor-audit — periodic audits against rigor checklist]

[Existing node bodies for son-goku.md, son-gohan.md, pan.md, saiyan.md, bardock.md — surveyed for canonical thesis-political citations; LABOR vertex anchors in body prose where present, REBELLION vertex anchors on Bardock + Saiyan via Universe-6-Defenders + Super-Saiyan-prophecy-Frieza-feared registers, STEWARDSHIP not cited at canonical-source rigor on any Saiyan-lineage node]
deferred_to_future_wave: If a future Edgelord/Mr-Nodeley pass extends one or more Saiyan-lineage node bodies with canonical-citation paragraphs sourced from Wizards-Wikipedia-Dragon-Ball-Wiki / Bandai-DBSCG / Toriyama-manga-or-anime — Goku-mentors-Uub end-of-Z beat for son-goku stewardship; Pan-resists-Baby-possession GT-Saga beat for pan rebellion; Gohan-mentors-the-next-generation Buu-Saga prelude for son-gohan stewardship — then dual or triple attribution becomes viable per the two-step discipline (body-citation first, related_hubs extension second).
notes: The fourth refusal-with-receipts of the corpus on triple-thesis-trajectory-audit lineage-subgraph candidates (sibling pattern: wave 71's refusal on multiple candidates against premature triple-attribution; wave 72's refusal on weave/chain topology-jargon framings; wave 73's refusal on Saiyan-lineage triple-attribution). Refusal-with-receipts is the curator-behavior; the substrate's quality compounds over time precisely because Edgelord refuses to fill in attribution on vibe. The discipline holds. Note that the wave-74 trivia HUNT surfaced a stewardship-citation-rich candidate at piccolo-jr (5 corpus prints, all carrying canonical mentor-register citations, threshold-passing per the wave-71 solo-character-node commissioning rigor) — that candidate transferred to Mr. Nodeley commission rather than remaining a lineage-subgraph audit, because the canonical evidence is sufficient at the single-character solo scope without needing distributed-lineage trajectory.
